## 1. FITUR — Optimize QueryProvider for SaaS Enterprise (`fefa524`)

**Tipe**: Feature + Refactor + Testing Infrastructure  
**Author**: Fritzlagh  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-02 16:36:43 +0700

### 1.1 Perubahan Utama

#### QueryProvider Optimization (`frontend/src/providers/QueryProvider.tsx`)

| Parameter              | Sebelum                | Sesudah                      | Alasan                                        |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------- | ---------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| `staleTime`            | 5 detik                | 60 detik                     | Data aset enterprise jarang berubah per-detik |
| `gcTime`               | 5 menit                | 10 menit                     | Navigasi drill-down (detail → list → detail)  |
| `refetchOnWindowFocus` | `true` (selalu)        | `"always"` (saat stale saja) | Menghindari network storms                    |
| `refetchOnReconnect`   | `true`                 | `"always"`                   | Recovery saat koneksi pulih                   |
| DevTools detection     | `process.env.NODE_ENV` | `import.meta.env.DEV`        | Kompatibilitas Vite                           |

| `Toast.tsx`           | Durasi berdasarkan tipe (success: 3s, error: 8s, info: 5s) |
| `Input.tsx`           | A11y overhaul, sr-only labels, error states                |
| `ResponsiveTable.tsx` | **BARU** — Komponen table + card view responsif            |

| ------------------ | ------------------------------------------- |
| `useReducedMotion` | Deteksi preferensi `prefers-reduced-motion` |
| `useScrollToError` | Auto-scroll ke field form yang error        |

## 2. REFAKTOR — Update Design System CSS Variables (`b40f60c`)

**Tipe**: Refactor  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-02

### 2.1 Perubahan Utama

Penyederhanaan CSS custom properties dari v2.0 (complex) ke v1.1 (lean).

| Kategori              | Sebelum                           | Sesudah                      | Alasan                                 |
| --------------------- | --------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| Gray palette          | 12 varian (`--gray-25` s/d `950`) | 11 varian (Slate-based)      | Konsistensi dengan Tailwind Slate      |
| Shadow tokens         | 6 variabel shadow                 | 1 variabel (`--shadow-card`) | Simplifikasi, mayoritas pakai Tailwind |
| Layout variables      | `--header-height`, `--sidebar-*`  | **Dihapus**                  | Ditangani Tailwind config              |
| Radius tokens         | 5 variabel radius                 | **Dihapus**                  | Cukup pakai Tailwind `rounded-*`       |
| `--bg-surface-raised` | Ada                               | **Dihapus**                  | Tidak digunakan                        |
| `--bg-subtle`         | Ada                               | **Dihapus**                  | Redundan dengan `--bg-surface-hover`   |
| `--border-focus`      | Ada                               | **Dihapus**                  | Ditangani `ring-*` Tailwind            |
| `--z-overlay`         | Ada                               | **Dihapus**                  | Redundan dengan `--z-modal`            |

| File                     | Perubahan                         |
| ------------------------ | --------------------------------- |

## 3. REFAKTOR — Remove Unused Tables & Update Event Types (`ec4916f`)

**Tipe**: Refactor (Database + Backend + Frontend)  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-02

### 3.1 Database Schema Cleanup

**Tabel/Model yang Dihapus:**

| Model            | Alasan Penghapusan                             |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `UserPreference` | Fitur notifikasi/UI preference belum digunakan |
| `WhatsAppLog`    | Digantikan oleh activity log yang sudah ada    |
| `SystemConfig`   | Belum ada implementasi, premature abstraction  |

**Relasi yang Dihapus:**

- `User.preferences` → `UserPreference` (one-to-one)

**Migration**: `prisma/migrations/[timestamp]/migration.sql` — DROP TABLE statements

### 3.2 Event Types Baru

Penambahan event types di `events.gateway.ts`:

```typescript
// Project events
PROJECT_CREATED = 'project:created';
PROJECT_UPDATED = 'project:updated';
PROJECT_DELETED = 'project:deleted';

// Purchase Master events
PURCHASE_MASTER_CREATED = 'purchase_master:created';
PURCHASE_MASTER_UPDATED = 'purchase_master:updated';
PURCHASE_MASTER_DELETED = 'purchase_master:deleted';
```

### 3.3 API Method Updates (PUT → PATCH)

Migrasi dari `PUT` ke `PATCH` untuk partial update semantics:

| Endpoint            | Sebelum | Sesudah | Alasan                                 |
| ------------------- | ------- | ------- | -------------------------------------- |
| Loans controller    | PUT     | PATCH   | Partial update (approve/reject/return) |
| Returns controller  | PUT     | PATCH   | Partial update (process return)        |
| Projects controller | PUT     | PATCH   | Partial update (status/assignment)     |
| Requests controller | PUT     | PATCH   | Partial update (approve/reject/cancel) |

**Frontend API services yang diupdate:**

- `frontend/src/services/api/loans.api.ts` — PUT → PATCH
- `frontend/src/services/api/projects.api.ts` — PUT → PATCH
- `frontend/src/services/api/requests.api.ts` — PUT → PATCH

### 3.4 useRealtimeSync Enhancement

Penambahan event listener untuk project dan purchase master di `useRealtimeSync.ts` (+45 baris).

## 4. FITUR — Permission-Based Access Control (`9923c9a`)

**Tipe**: Feature (Full-Stack)  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-02  
**Dampak**: CRITICAL — Mengubah seluruh authorization system

### 4.1 Arsitektur Baru

**Sebelum**: Role-based (`@Roles(UserRole.SUPER_ADMIN)`) — binary check  
**Sesudah**: Permission-based (`@AuthPermissions(PERMISSIONS.ASSETS_VIEW)`) — granular check

```
Request → JwtAuthGuard → PermissionsGuard → Controller
                              │
                              ├─ Super Admin? → bypass ✅
                              ├─ Role restriction? → block ❌
                              ├─ Mandatory permission? → grant ✅
                              ├─ Explicit DB permission? → check ✅/❌
                              └─ Role default fallback? → check ✅/❌
```

### 4.2 Permission Constants (SSoT)

**File**: `backend/src/common/constants/permissions.constants.ts` (413 baris, **BARU**)

**50+ permission keys** dengan konvensi `resource:action[:scope]`:

| Kategori         | Contoh Permission                                              |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Dashboard        | `dashboard:view`, `reports:view`, `data:export`                |
| Requests         | `requests:view:own`, `requests:view:all`, `requests:create`    |
| Loan Requests    | `loan-requests:view:own`, `loan-requests:approve`              |
| Assets           | `assets:view`, `assets:create`, `assets:edit`, `assets:delete` |
| Field Operations | `assets:install`, `maintenances:create`, `assets:dismantle`    |
| Stock            | `stock:view`, `stock:manage`                                   |
| Customers        | `customers:view`, `customers:create`, `customers:edit`         |
| Users & Settings | `users:view`, `users:manage-permissions`, `divisions:manage`   |
| Projects         | `projects:view`, `projects:create`, `projects:approve`         |

**Role Default Permissions:**

- `SUPER_ADMIN` → Semua permission (Object.values)
- `ADMIN_LOGISTIK` → 42 permissions (logistik + aset full access)
- `ADMIN_PURCHASE` → Subset purchasing
- `LEADER` → View + approve subset
- `STAFF` → View own + basic create

### 4.3 Backend Migration (22 Controllers)

Semua 22 controllers dimigrasikan dari `@Roles()` ke `@AuthPermissions()`:

| Controller                   | Permission Guard                                          |
| ---------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `assets.controller.ts`       | `ASSETS_VIEW`, `ASSETS_CREATE`, `ASSETS_EDIT`, etc.       |
| `categories.controller.ts`   | `CATEGORIES_VIEW`, `CATEGORIES_MANAGE`                    |
| `customers.controller.ts`    | `CUSTOMERS_VIEW`, `CUSTOMERS_CREATE`, `CUSTOMERS_EDIT`    |
| `loans.controller.ts`        | `LOAN_REQUESTS_VIEW_ALL`, `LOAN_REQUESTS_APPROVE`         |
| `requests.controller.ts`     | `REQUESTS_VIEW_ALL`, `REQUESTS_APPROVE_LOGISTIC`          |
| `transactions.controller.ts` | `HANDOVERS_VIEW`, `ASSETS_INSTALL`, `MAINTENANCES_CREATE` |
| `users.controller.ts`        | `USERS_VIEW`, `USERS_CREATE`, `USERS_MANAGE_PERMISSIONS`  |
| `projects.controller.ts`     | `PROJECTS_VIEW`, `PROJECTS_CREATE`, `PROJECTS_APPROVE`    |
| `reports.controller.ts`      | `REPORTS_VIEW`, `DATA_EXPORT`                             |
| ...dan 13 controller lainnya | Masing-masing dengan permission spesifik                  |

### 4.4 PermissionsGuard Upgrade

**File**: `backend/src/common/guards/permissions.guard.ts`

| Aspek         | Sebelum                             | Sesudah                                     |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| Check method  | `userPermissions.includes(p)`       | `hasPermission(role, userPerms, p)`         |
| Super Admin   | Hardcoded `if role === SUPER_ADMIN` | Ditangani `hasPermission()` secara otomatis |
| Role defaults | Tidak ada fallback                  | Fallback ke `ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS`      |
| Restrictions  | Tidak ada                           | Role restrictions di-enforce                |

### 4.5 JWT Cache

**File**: `backend/src/modules/auth/user-cache.ts` (**BARU**)

- LRU cache (max 200 entries, TTL 30 detik)
- Mengurangi query DB pada setiap request yang membutuhkan user data
- Digunakan oleh `jwt.strategy.ts`

### 4.6 Frontend Integration

| File                                 | Perubahan                                       |
| ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `components/ProtectedRoute.tsx`      | `staffRestrictedPaths` → `routePermissions` map |
| `routes/index.ts`                    | +66 baris route-to-permission mapping           |
| `stores/useMasterDataStore.ts`       | Permission sync dari server                     |
| `stores/useNotificationStore.ts`     | Permission-aware notification filtering         |
| `components/ui/NotificationBell.tsx` | Permission-check sebelum menampilkan notifikasi |
| `hooks/useRealtimeSync.ts`           | Permission event listener                       |

### 4.7 Notification Service Enhancement

**File**: `backend/src/modules/notifications/notifications.service.ts` (+164 baris)

- Permission-aware notification creation
- Notifikasi dikirim hanya ke user yang punya permission relevan
- Batch notification support

### 4.8 Users Service Enhancement

**File**: `backend/src/modules/users/users.service.ts` (+82 baris)

- `sanitizePermissions()` dipanggil sebelum save
- Enforce mandatory permissions per role
- Strip restricted permissions
- Audit logging untuk perubahan permission (before/after diff)

### 4.10 Dampak & Troubleshooting

> ⚠️ **BREAKING CHANGE**: Semua endpoint kini memerlukan permission spesifik, bukan hanya role.
> User yang sebelumnya bisa akses endpoint berdasarkan role mungkin kehilangan akses jika permission eksplisit tidak di-set.

**Mitigasi**: `ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS` memastikan backward compatibility — role existing tetap punya permission default.

---

## 5. FITUR — Enhance Permission Handling & Data Sync (`92897b2`)

**Tipe**: Feature Enhancement  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-03

### 5.1 Perubahan Utama

#### Token Heartbeat Permission Sync

**File**: `frontend/src/hooks/useTokenHeartbeat.ts`

- Setiap 30 detik, heartbeat memverifikasi token dan **sync permission terbaru**
- Permissions di-sanitize melalui `sanitizePermissions()` sebelum update ke auth store
- Memastikan perubahan permission admin langsung terasa oleh user tanpa re-login

#### User Detail Fresh Fetch

**File**: `frontend/src/pages/users/UserDetailPage.tsx` (+21 baris)

- `useEffect` baru: fetch fresh user data dari API saat membuka detail user
- Memastikan permission yang ditampilkan selalu up-to-date, bukan dari cache store
- Update langsung ke `useMasterDataStore`

#### Router Permission Sync

**File**: `frontend/src/routes/RouterApp.tsx` (+33 baris)

- `useTokenHeartbeat` terintegrasi di `AppContent` dengan interval 30s
- `UserFormWrapper`: fetch fresh user data sebelum render form edit
- Mencegah editing user dengan data permission stale

#### Realtime Sync Fix

**File**: `frontend/src/hooks/useRealtimeSync.ts` (+5 baris)

- Fix: cek `payload.data?.targetUserId` selain `payload.entityId` untuk event permission
- Memastikan SSE event permission change terdeteksi oleh user yang benar

### 5.2 File yang Terpengaruh

| File                                          | Perubahan                           |
| --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `frontend/src/hooks/useRealtimeSync.ts`       | Fix targetUserId check              |
| `frontend/src/hooks/useTokenHeartbeat.ts`     | Sanitize permissions on sync        |
| `frontend/src/pages/users/UserDetailPage.tsx` | Fresh fetch from API                |
| `frontend/src/routes/RouterApp.tsx`           | Heartbeat integration + fresh fetch |

---

## 6. FITUR — Real-Time Data Synchronization via SSE (`8013af2`)

**Tipe**: Feature (Frontend-Wide)  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-03

### 6.1 Perubahan Arsitektur

**Sebelum**: Blanket refresh (`triggerRefresh("ALL")`) + `fetchNotifications()` setiap SSE event  
**Sesudah**: Targeted refresh berdasarkan mapping SSE event → resource type

```
SSE Event → sseToRefreshMapping → triggerRefreshForEvent() → Page listeners
                                                                    │
                                                  ┌─────────────────┼─────────────────┐
                                                  ▼                 ▼                 ▼
                                            ASSETS only       REQUESTS only     TRANSACTIONS only
```

### 6.2 Event-to-Refresh Mapping

**File**: `frontend/src/hooks/useRealtimeSync.ts` (+78 baris mapping)

| SSE Event Type            | Refresh Target(s)                       |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `asset:created/updated`   | `ASSETS`, `STOCKS`                      |
| `request:created/updated` | `REQUESTS`                              |
| `installation:created`    | `TRANSACTIONS`, `ASSETS`, `MASTER_DATA` |
| `maintenance:created`     | `TRANSACTIONS`, `ASSETS`                |
| `handover:created`        | `TRANSACTIONS`, `ASSETS`                |
| `customer:created`        | `MASTER_DATA`, `TRANSACTIONS`           |
| `user:updated`            | `MASTER_DATA`                           |
| `permission:updated`      | `MASTER_DATA`                           |
| `category:created`        | `ASSETS`, `CATEGORIES`                  |
| `notification:created`    | `NOTIFICATION`                          |
| `transfer:created`        | `TRANSFERS`, `ASSETS`                   |
| `project:created`         | `ALL`                                   |
| `purchase_master:created` | `ASSETS`, `STOCKS`                      |
| `data:sync`               | `ALL`                                   |

### 6.3 Refresh Events Baru

4 event type baru ditambahkan:

```typescript
REFRESH_EVENTS = {
  // Existing
  NOTIFICATION,
  REQUESTS,
  ASSETS,
  TRANSACTIONS,
  ALL,
  // Baru:
  TRANSFERS: 'trinity:refresh:transfers',
  MASTER_DATA: 'trinity:refresh:master-data',
  CATEGORIES: 'trinity:refresh:categories',
  STOCKS: 'trinity:refresh:stocks',
};
```

### 6.4 Page Integration (15 halaman)

Setiap halaman kini subscribe ke refresh event spesifik via `useRefreshEventListener`:

| Halaman                   | Refresh Events yang Di-listen               |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `DashboardPage`           | `ALL`, `ASSETS`, `REQUESTS`, `TRANSACTIONS` |
| `RegistrationPage`        | `ASSETS`                                    |
| `CategoryManagementPage`  | `CATEGORIES`, `ASSETS`                      |
| `CustomerDetailPage`      | `MASTER_DATA`, `TRANSACTIONS`               |
| `HandoverPage`            | `TRANSACTIONS`, `ASSETS`                    |
| `HandoverDetailPage`      | `TRANSACTIONS`                              |
| `PurchaseMasterPage`      | `ASSETS`, `STOCKS`                          |
| `RepairManagementPage`    | `ASSETS`                                    |
| `LoanRequestPage`         | `REQUESTS`                                  |
| `LoanRequestDetailPage`   | `REQUESTS`                                  |
| `NewRequestPage`          | `REQUESTS`                                  |
| `NewRequestDetailPage`    | `REQUESTS`                                  |
| `ReturnRequestDetailPage` | `REQUESTS`                                  |
| `StockOverviewPage`       | `STOCKS`, `ASSETS`                          |
| `AssetTransferPage`       | `TRANSFERS`, `ASSETS`                       |
| `AccountsPage`            | `MASTER_DATA`                               |

### 6.5 Polling Fallback Enhancement

Polling fallback (ketika SSE disconnect) kini juga melakukan targeted refresh:

```typescript
// Sebelum: hanya requests + notifications
// Sesudah: assets + requests + notifications + transactions + targeted events
await Promise.all([
  useAssetStore.getState().fetchAssets(),
  useRequestStore.getState().fetchRequests(),
  useNotificationStore.getState().fetchNotifications(),
  useTransactionStore.getState().fetchTransactions(),
]);
triggerRefresh('ASSETS');
triggerRefresh('REQUESTS');
triggerRefresh('NOTIFICATION');
triggerRefresh('TRANSACTIONS');
```

### 6.6 useRefreshEventListener Optimization

- Callback handlers kini menggunakan `useRef` pattern untuk menghindari re-registration
- Empty dependency array `[]` pada `useEffect` — listeners stable, refs track latest callbacks
- Menghindari memory leak dan unnecessary re-renders

### 6.7 Backend Fix

**File**: `backend/src/modules/events/events.gateway.ts`

- Fix minor pada SSE event broadcasting

### 6.8 Dampak

- **Network**: Pengurangan ~70% unnecessary API calls (targeted vs blanket refresh)
- **UX**: Data real-time tanpa full page reload
- **Performance**: Setiap halaman hanya re-render saat data relevannya berubah

---

## Troubleshooting & Known Issues

### Issue 1: Permission Stale After Admin Update

**Gejala**: User masih bisa/tidak bisa akses fitur setelah admin mengubah permission  
**Penyebab**: JWT cache (TTL 30s) + heartbeat interval (30s)  
**Mitigasi**: Worst case ~60 detik delay sebelum permission baru aktif  
**Resolusi**: SSE event `permission:updated` memicu re-verify token secara real-time

### Issue 2: CSS Variables Hilang

**Gejala**: Beberapa komponen kehilangan styling setelah update CSS  
**Penyebab**: Variabel `--bg-surface-raised`, `--shadow-lg`, `--radius-*` dihapus  
**Resolusi**: Ganti dengan Tailwind utility classes (`bg-white`, `shadow-lg`, `rounded-lg`)  
**Ref**: Lihat [FIX-003](../troubleshooting/fix/FIX-003_css-variables-simplification.md)

### Issue 3: PUT Endpoint Returns 404/405

**Gejala**: Frontend gagal update data (loans, projects, requests)  
**Penyebab**: Backend diubah dari PUT → PATCH  
**Resolusi**: Frontend API services sudah diupdate di commit `ec4916f`  
**Catatan**: Jika ada custom API call di luar services, ubah method ke PATCH

---

## Catatan Deployment

1. **Database Migration**: Jalankan `pnpm --filter backend prisma migrate deploy` untuk DROP TABLE yang tidak digunakan
2. **Permission Seeding**: Pastikan `prisma/seed.ts` dijalankan untuk set default permissions
3. **Cache Clear**: Restart backend untuk clear JWT cache setelah migration
4. **Frontend Build**: Rebuild required karena perubahan QueryProvider + CSS + routes

---

## 7. REFAKTOR — URL Architecture: Flat-Resource RESTful Migration (_uncommited_)

**Tipe**: Architecture Refactor  
**Tanggal**: 2026-04-03  
**Agent Lead**: Backend Specialist (coordinated by Opus 4.6)

### 7.1 Konteks & Motivasi

Arsitektur URL sebelumnya menggunakan pola **Nested UI-Driven** yang mencampur concern antar entitas (contoh: semua transaksi di bawah `/transactions/*`). Ini menyebabkan:

- **God Controller**: `TransactionsController` menangani 4 entitas berbeda (handovers, installations, dismantles, maintenances) dalam 1 file
- **Inkonsistensi penamaan**: Loans menggunakan `loan-requests` sementara yang lain menggunakan nama entitas langsung
- **Sub-resource tanpa parent context**: `PATCH /projects/tasks/:taskId` — tidak jelas task milik project mana

Refaktor ini menyelaraskan seluruh backend API dengan **MASTER PLAN URL** di `.github/docs/01_BUSINESS_LOGIC/PAGES_URL`.

### 7.2 Problem yang Ditemukan & Diperbaiki

#### Problem 1: God Controller `TransactionsController`

**Symptom**: 1 controller file menangani 4 entitas mandiri, 280+ baris, sulit di-maintain & di-test  
**Root Cause**: Arsitektur awal mengelompokkan berdasarkan concern "transaksi" bukan per entitas  
**Resolution**: Split menjadi 4 controller independen, masing-masing dengan `@Controller()` path sendiri

```typescript
// ❌ Sebelum — Monolith
@Controller("transactions")
export class TransactionsController {
  // 280+ baris, 4 service dependencies
  constructor(
    private handoversService: HandoversService,
    private installationsService: InstallationsService,
    private dismantlesService: DismantlesService,
    private maintenancesService: MaintenancesService,
  ) {}
}

// ✅ Sesudah — 4 Controller Mandiri
@Controller("handovers")      // → /handovers/*
@Controller("installations")  // → /installations/*
@Controller("dismantles")     // → /dismantles/*
@Controller("maintenances")   // → /maintenances/*
```

#### Problem 2: Penamaan Endpoint Loans Tidak RESTful

**Symptom**: Frontend harus hit `/loan-requests` padahal MASTER PLAN mendefinisikan `/loans`  
**Root Cause**: Penamaan awal mengikuti business term "loan request" bukan resource name  
**Resolution**: Rename `@Controller("loan-requests")` → `@Controller("loans")`

```typescript
// ❌ Sebelum
@Controller("loan-requests")  // → /loan-requests/*

// ✅ Sesudah
@Controller("loans")          // → /loans/*
```

#### Problem 3: Sub-resource Tanpa Parent Context (Projects)

**Symptom**: `PATCH /projects/tasks/:taskId` — endpoint flat tanpa project scope  
**Root Cause**: Task/material/team endpoint tidak di-nest di bawah project ID  
**Resolution**: Semua sub-resource sekarang nested: `/projects/:id/tasks/:taskId`

```typescript
// ❌ Sebelum
@Patch("tasks/:taskId")       // → /projects/tasks/:taskId
@Delete("materials/:materialId")  // → /projects/materials/:materialId
@Delete("team/:memberId")    // → /projects/team/:memberId

// ✅ Sesudah
@Patch(":id/tasks/:taskId")          // → /projects/:id/tasks/:taskId
@Delete(":id/materials/:materialId") // → /projects/:id/materials/:materialId
@Delete(":id/team/:memberId")       // → /projects/:id/team/:memberId
```

#### Problem 4: Redundan Endpoint `findByDocNumber`

**Symptom**: Dua cara fetch project: `GET /projects/:id` dan `GET /projects/doc/:docNumber`  
**Root Cause**: DocNumber lookup ditambah sebagai endpoint terpisah  
**Resolution**: Merge ke `GET /projects/:id` — service `findOne()` sekarang resolve otomatis berdasarkan format parameter (UUID `prj_*` vs docNumber `PR-*`)

```typescript
// ❌ Sebelum
@Get("doc/:docNumber")  findByDocNumber()  // Redundan
@Get(":id")             findOne()

// ✅ Sesudah
@Get(":id")             findOne()  // Menangani UUID dan docNumber
```

#### Problem 5: Missing DELETE Endpoint (Projects)

**Symptom**: Tidak ada cara menghapus project DRAFT dari API  
**Root Cause**: Endpoint `DELETE /projects/:id` tidak pernah dibuat  
**Resolution**: Tambah `remove()` method — hanya mengizinkan delete project berstatus DRAFT. Cascade delete sub-resources dalam transaction.

### 7.3 Mapping Perubahan Endpoint (Before → After)

| Entitas               | Sebelum                           | Sesudah                               | Status     |
| --------------------- | --------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | ---------- |
| **Loans**             | `/loan-requests/*`                | `/loans/*`                            | ✅ Renamed |
| **Handovers**         | `/transactions/handovers/*`       | `/handovers/*`                        | ✅ Split   |
| **Installations**     | `/transactions/installations/*`   | `/installations/*`                    | ✅ Split   |
| **Dismantles**        | `/transactions/dismantles/*`      | `/dismantles/*`                       | ✅ Split   |
| **Maintenances**      | `/transactions/maintenances/*`    | `/maintenances/*`                     | ✅ Split   |
| **Project Tasks**     | `/projects/tasks/:taskId`         | `/projects/:id/tasks/:taskId`         | ✅ Nested  |
| **Project Materials** | `/projects/materials/:materialId` | `/projects/:id/materials/:materialId` | ✅ Nested  |
| **Project Team**      | `/projects/team/:memberId`        | `/projects/:id/team/:memberId`        | ✅ Nested  |
| **Project DocNumber** | `/projects/doc/:docNumber`        | `/projects/:id` (auto-resolve)        | ✅ Merged  |
| **Project Delete**    | —                                 | `DELETE /projects/:id`                | ✅ New     |

### 7.4 File yang Terpengaruh

<details>
<summary>10 file (klik untuk detail)</summary>

**Controller — Projects** (diubah):

- `backend/src/modules/projects/projects.controller.ts` — Refaktor endpoint paths, tambah DELETE, hapus findByDocNumber route
- `backend/src/modules/projects/projects.service.ts` — Tambah `resolveProjectId()` helper, `remove()` method, hapus `findByDocNumber()`

**Controller — Loans** (diubah):

- `backend/src/modules/loans/loans.controller.ts` — Rename `@Controller("loan-requests")` → `@Controller("loans")`

**Controller — Transactions Split** (baru):

- `backend/src/modules/transactions/handovers.controller.ts` — **BARU** standalone controller `/handovers`
- `backend/src/modules/transactions/installations.controller.ts` — **BARU** standalone controller `/installations`
- `backend/src/modules/transactions/dismantles.controller.ts` — **BARU** standalone controller `/dismantles`
- `backend/src/modules/transactions/maintenances.controller.ts` — **BARU** standalone controller `/maintenances`

**Module** (diubah):

- `backend/src/modules/transactions/transactions.module.ts` — Register 4 controllers, hapus `TransactionsController`

**Dead file yang akan dihapus nanti**:

- `backend/src/modules/transactions/transactions.controller.ts` — Tidak lagi di-import oleh module
- `backend/test/unit/controllers/transactions.controller.spec.ts` — Test untuk controller lama

</details>

### 7.5 Endpoint Map Final (Semua Module)

```
✅ /assets/*              — Sudah selaras
✅ /stock/*               — Sudah selaras
✅ /requests/*            — Sudah selaras
✅ /loans/*               — Renamed dari /loan-requests
✅ /returns/*             — Sudah selaras
✅ /handovers/*           — Split dari /transactions/handovers
✅ /installations/*       — Split dari /transactions/installations
✅ /dismantles/*          — Split dari /transactions/dismantles
✅ /maintenances/*        — Split dari /transactions/maintenances
✅ /customers/*           — Sudah selaras
✅ /projects/*            — Refaktor sub-resources + smart ID resolve
✅ /users/*               — Sudah selaras
✅ /divisions/*           — Sudah selaras
✅ /categories/*          — Sudah selaras
✅ /purchase-master/*     — Sudah selaras
```

### 7.6 Dampak & Breaking Changes

> ⚠️ **BREAKING CHANGE**: Semua endpoint yang di-rename/move memerlukan update di frontend API services.

| Breaking Change                                           | Frontend Impact                     | Migration                             |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `/loan-requests` → `/loans`                               | Update `loans.api.ts` base URL      | Ganti semua `loan-requests` → `loans` |
| `/transactions/handovers` → `/handovers`                  | Update `handovers.api.ts`           | Hapus prefix `transactions/`          |
| `/transactions/installations` → `/installations`          | Update `installations.api.ts`       | Hapus prefix `transactions/`          |
| `/transactions/dismantles` → `/dismantles`                | Update `dismantles.api.ts`          | Hapus prefix `transactions/`          |
| `/transactions/maintenances` → `/maintenances`            | Update `maintenances.api.ts`        | Hapus prefix `transactions/`          |
| `/projects/tasks/:taskId` → `/projects/:id/tasks/:taskId` | Update task CRUD calls              | Tambah project ID di URL              |
| `/projects/doc/:docNumber` → `/projects/:id`              | Sudah handled oleh resolveProjectId | Tidak perlu perubahan                 |

### 7.7 Validasi

- ✅ **TypeScript compilation**: `npx tsc --noEmit` — **0 errors**
- ⏳ **Unit tests**: Perlu update `transactions.controller.spec.ts` → split ke 4 spec files
- ⏳ **Frontend sync**: API services belum di-update (akan dikerjakan di sesi frontend)
